# new_summarised_result { #cdmconnector.new_summarised_result }

```python
new_summarised_result(x, settings=None)
```

Construct a SummarisedResult from a DataFrame and optional settings.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                            | Description                                           | Default    |
|----------|---------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| x        | pandas.DataFrame or dict        | Results data with standard summarised_result columns. | _required_ |
| settings | pandas.DataFrame, dict, or None | Settings table.                                       | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |
